name: DebridHub
description: Replaces the *arr stack: direct streaming via self-refreshing .strm files, batch downloads, Torznab search, a watchlist, a Seerr/Jellyseerr request webhook, and a library organizer.
overview: Stream and batch-download from Real-Debrid / AllDebrid inside Jellyfin.

versions.changelog: Fixes id-based search grabbing the wrong show (e.g. Sand Land for CSI: NY). Jackett aggregates forward a tvdbid/imdbid search to indexers that ignore it and return junk, so DebridHub now verifies each result against the shows known titles from TMDb (all languages) in addition to the season/episode. Foreign-titled releases still match via TMDb alternate titles; unrelated shows sharing an episode number are rejected.
